benefits.description: Cognitive effects including focus improvements; noticeable within days
Mood tracking recommended as individual response varies widely

side_effects.description: Irritability or overstimulation at higher doses; can feel wired or edgy
Can interfere with sleep if taken late in the day

protocol_notes: Recommends starting at 300mcg to assess tolerance, morning dosing, 4-6 week cycles with 1-2 weeks off to prevent tolerance. Notes effects noticeable within days.
